intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple past of to see.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o passado simples de ver.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el pasado simple de ver.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le passé simple de voir.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to see is common in daily speech.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo ver é comum na fala do dia a dia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo ver es común en el habla diaria.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe voir est courant dans la langue quotidienne.

sample_sentences.en: I saw the mountains from there.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eu vi as montanhas de lá.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Yo vi las montañas desde allí.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: J'ai vu les montagnes de là.
Tu as vu la réponse clairement.

sample_sentences.en: He saw his friends on Saturday.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ele viu os amigos no sábado.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Él vio a sus amigos el sábado.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il a vu ses amis samedi.

sample_sentences.en: She saw the difference right away.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela viu a diferença na hora.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle a vu la différence tout de suite.

sample_sentences.en: It saw movement in the dark.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il a vu du mouvement dans le noir.

sample_sentences.en: We saw each other on Monday.
You all saw the same screen.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Vous avez vu le même écran.

sample_sentences.en: They saw the city lights at night.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eles viram as luzes da cidade à noite.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ellos vieron las luces de la ciudad por la noche.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ils ont vu les lumières de la ville la nuit.
